tools.title: Oil-to-India Impact Estimator
tools.description: Move the Brent price and see what it does to India's oil import bill, inflation and the market regime, on Harshal's published framework.

tools.title: SIP Calculator
tools.description: See what a monthly SIP could grow to, invested amount, estimated returns and total value, with a year-by-year growth chart.

tools.title: Returns Calculator
tools.description: Three in one, project a lumpsum, measure CAGR, or compute XIRR across irregular cashflows.

tools.title: Capital-Gains Tax Calculator
tools.description: Estimate tax on listed-equity and equity-fund gains under current Indian rules (FY 2026-27), STCG, LTCG and the Rs 1.25 lakh exemption.

tools.title: FII / FPI Historical Flows
tools.description: Three decades of net foreign investment into Indian markets — financial-year, calendar-year and monthly net flows, charted (1992–2026).
